emails.subject: POWER-SS-R3C-PRC book
emails.body: POWER-SS-R3C-PRC book Nancy, The following book POWER-SS-R3C-PRC should be made inactive. The book was for a compound option that was being calculated on a spreadsheet. The option was not exercised and its value was taken to $0 yesterday, 10/18/01. Thank you. Michael Mattox x34317

emails.subject: RE: POWER-SS-R3C-PRC book
emails.body: RE: POWER-SS-R3C-PRC book You can inactive the book on the active/inactive website. Do you also need the book's counterparty ID inactivated? If yes, please reply and provide the CPID that needs to be suspended. Please also ensue that the book has been uploaded with zeros values to ensure compliance with Credit and cash flow requirments. Regards, Nancy

emails.subject: RE: POWER-SS-R3C-PRC book
emails.body: On 10/18/01 the book with uploaded with MTM, delta position and gross position set to zero. The book was just made inactive on the website. Michael Mattox x34317
